rules: On your turn, name a footballer who fits both the row and the column of a cell.
Each footballer can only be used once per board, and a wrong pick hands the turn to your opponent.
Claim three cells in a row to win.
Stuck? Skip your turn or propose a tie that everyone agrees to.
No internet? Swipe right on the game card to play on one phone.

redCard.title: Red Card
redCard.tagline: One of you is faking it

rules: Everyone but the faker is given the same footballer.
Each round the app asks one question and everyone types a secret answer. The answers are revealed one by one. After the last round you vote on who to send off.
Sent off as the faker? Name the footballer to steal the win back.
No internet? Swipe right on the game card to play on one phone.
Guess the daily footballer. Guesses are unlimited, but solve it in 10 or fewer to keep your streak.
After each guess, every column turns green for a match, yellow if close, and grey if wrong.
A new footballer drops every day, the same for everyone.
Name every player in the day's top 10 list. Type a name and submit.
Wrong guesses count as misses, but you can't lose. Keep going until the board is full.
Finish with 10 or fewer misses to keep your streak.
A new list drops every day, the same for everyone.
Guess the daily footballer from their career path. Every club they played for is on the board from the start.
Guesses are unlimited. Each wrong guess unlocks a hint: nationality, then position, then age.
Solve it in 10 or fewer to keep your streak.
A new career drops every day, the same for everyone.
Fill in the day's famous starting XI. Type a name and submit, or tap a shirt to aim at that exact spot.
Every shirt shows its number. A ball means a goal, a boot means an assist, C is the captain, swap arrows mean they were substituted, and a yellow or red card means they were booked or sent off.
Wrong guesses count as misses, but you can't lose. Finish with 5 or fewer to keep your streak.
A new team sheet drops every day, the same for everyone.
Every round shows four footballers. Three share something hidden, like a club, a country or a trophy, and one does not.
Everyone races to tap the odd one out before the clock runs dry. The faster you are, the more points a correct pick earns.
After the last round the highest total wins.
No internet? Swipe right on the game card to play on one phone.
Every round asks one question, like naming a player who played for a certain club.
Everyone secretly picks a real footballer at the same time.
Rare picks score big, famous picks score little, and a wrong answer scores nothing.
Highest total after all rounds wins.
No internet? Swipe right on the game card to play on one phone.

social.title: Social
social.onboardBody: Pick a name your friends will recognise and share your code. Friends only ever see scores and streaks, never answers.

redCard.title: Red Card

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Everyone but the faker is given the same footballer. Each round the app asks one question and everyone types a secret answer. The answers are revealed one by one. After the last round you vote on who to send off. Sent off as the faker? Guess the footballer to steal it back.

role.imposterBody: You weren't given a player. Blend in, bluff your answers, and avoid the red card.

answer.hint: Everyone answers the same question. Keep it short.

answers.hostAdvances: The host reads the answers out loud

questions.q1: What would this player be worth today if he was in his prime?
questions.q4: Which position would suit him best today?
questions.q5: Would he get a starting spot on your favourite team?
questions.q6: How many goals would he score in a season in his prime?
questions.q8: Which shirt number fits him best?
questions.q10: How fun is he to watch, from 1 to 10?
questions.q11: How famous is he outside football, from 1 to 10?
questions.q12: Would he make a good manager one day?
questions.q16: Which league suits his style best?
questions.q19: How many yellow cards would he pick up in a season?
questions.q20: Rate his goal celebrations from 1 to 10.
questions.q21: What would his highest FIFA rating be?
questions.q26: Would you trust him with a penalty in a final?
questions.q27: Rate his haircuts over the years from 1 to 10.
questions.q30: Which national team would he improve the most?
questions.q45: How far would a team of 11 of him go in the Champions League?
questions.q48: Rate his weak foot from 1 to 10.
questions.q49: Which position would he be worst at?
questions.q50: Which club that he never played for fits him best?
questions.q51: Where would he finish in the Ballon d'Or in his best year?
questions.q53: Rate his big-game performances from 1 to 10.
questions.q57: What would make him a better player?

explanation.nationality: {{name}} does not represent {{country}}. The other three do.
explanation.club: {{name}} never played for {{club}}. The other three did.

position.GK: {{name}} is not a goalkeeper. The other three are.

explanation.league: {{name}} never played in {{league}}. The other three did.
explanation.shirtNumber: {{name}} never wore the number {{number}}. The other three did.
explanation.teammate: {{name}} never played alongside {{player}}. The other three did.
explanation.bornDecade: {{name}} was not born in the {{decade}}s. The other three were.
explanation.oneClub: {{name}} played for more than one club. The other three each spent their whole career at a single club.
explanation.honourYear: {{name}} did not win the {{year}} {{competition}}. The other three did.
explanation.playedInCountry: {{name}} never played in {{country}}. The other three did.
explanation.continent: {{name}} is not from {{continent}}. The other three are.
explanation.managedBy: {{name}} never played under {{manager}}. The other three did.
explanation.legends: {{name}} is a current star, not one of the all-time greats. The other three are legends of the game.

help.title: How to play
help.rule1: Every round shows four footballers. Three share something hidden, like a club, a country or a trophy, and one does not.
help.rule2: Everyone races to tap the odd one out before the clock runs dry. The faster you are, the more points a correct pick earns.
help.rule3: After the last round the highest total wins.

local.setupSub: Add at least {{count}} names, then pass one phone around.
local.questionIntro: Only {{name}} answers this one. The clock starts when the cards show.
local.helpRule2: You take turns on one phone. Your own clock starts when you reveal the cards, and the faster you are, the more points a correct pick earns.
local.revealIntro: Put the phone in the middle.

cultHero.title: Cult Hero

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Every round asks one question and everyone secretly picks a real footballer at the same time. The rarer your pick, the more points it scores. A wrong answer scores nothing. Highest total after all rounds wins.

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Guess the day's player. Guesses are unlimited, but solve it in 10 or fewer to keep your streak. After each guess, every column turns green if it matches, yellow if it's close, and grey if it's wrong.
help.arrows: The arrow on Age points toward the secret player's age.
help.daily: A new footballer drops every day, the same for everyone.

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Guess the day's footballer from their career path. Every club spell is on the board from the start, oldest first.
help.hints: Guesses are unlimited. Each wrong guess unlocks a hint: nationality first, then position, then age.
help.streak: Solve it in 10 guesses or fewer to keep your streak. Giving up resets it.
help.daily: A new career drops every day, the same for everyone.

teamsheet.title: Team sheet
teamsheet.streakNotifBody: Your {{days}}-day Team sheet streak is on the line.
teamsheet.wrongSlotToast: On the sheet, but not in that spot
teamsheet.giveUpMessage: The remaining players will be shown and your streak resets.
teamsheet.wonNoStreak: All 11 named. 5 or fewer misses keeps your streak next time.
teamsheet.streakWarning: Finish with 5 or fewer misses to keep your streak
teamsheet.streakGone: Your streak is gone for today, but keep going

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Fill in the day's famous starting XI. Type a name and hit return, or tap a shirt first to aim at that exact spot. Aiming at the wrong spot counts as a miss.
help.clues: Every shirt shows its number. A ball means they scored in the match, a boot means an assist, C is the captain, the swap arrows mean they were substituted, and a yellow or red card means they were booked or sent off.
help.streak: Wrong guesses count as misses, but you can't lose. Finish with 5 or fewer to keep your streak.
help.daily: A new team sheet drops every day, the same for everyone.

tenball.streakWarning: Finish with 10 or fewer misses to keep your streak
tenball.streakGone: Your streak is gone for today, but keep going

help.title: How to play
help.rule: Name every player in the day's top 10. Type a name and hit return. Wrong guesses just count as misses, you can never lose the board.
help.streak: Finish with 10 or fewer misses to keep your streak. Giving up resets it.
help.daily: A new list drops every day, the same for everyone.

legend.title: How the grid works
legend.intro: Name a footballer who matches both the row and the column of a cell. Here's what each axis on this grid means.

meaning.treble: Has won the treble (league, cup & Champions League in one season)

update.title: Update Miflo
update.body: You're on an older version of Miflo. Update to the latest version to keep playing with your friends.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hapticsDesc: Vibrations on taps and key moments.
settings.scoutReminderDesc: A daily nudge when the new games drop.

aboutPage.title: About Miflo
aboutPage.blurb: Miflo is social party games for friends in the same room. Gather everyone, pick a game and play together.
aboutPage.disclaimer: Miflo is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by any football league, club, player or governing body. Player names and career statistics are factual information used for trivia purposes. All artwork is original illustration.

howToPlay.title: How to play
howToPlay.intro: Most Miflo games are played together in the same room: one phone starts a party and everyone else joins with the code. Scout is a solo daily puzzle you can play on your own.
howToPlay.step1Desc: Tap Create a party to get a code, or Join a party and type a friend's code.
howToPlay.step2Desc: The host picks a game once at least two players have joined.

oneDevice.title: One device
oneDevice.intro: Several of the games can also be played together on a single phone. No internet needed, so it works on a plane or anywhere offline.
oneDevice.step1Desc: On the Games tab, swipe right on any game that offers 1 device play.
oneDevice.step2Desc: A round 1 device button appears on the left of the card. Tap it to start.
oneDevice.step3Desc: Take turns on one phone. The screen always says who may look before anything secret is shown.

transfer.title: Move to a new phone
transfer.intro: Your profile lives on this phone, not in an account. To carry it to a new phone, set up Miflo there, enter your code, then approve the move here. Keep this phone nearby until it is done.
transfer.step1Title: Open Miflo on the new phone
transfer.step1Desc: Install and open Miflo on the new phone, then tap "Already have a profile?" on the profile page.
transfer.step2Desc: Type this phone's code on the new phone. A short match code appears on both screens.
transfer.step3Desc: This phone asks you to approve. Check the match code matches, then approve. Your friends, stats and streaks move over and this phone signs out.
transfer.enterCodeBody: Enter the code from your other phone. You will approve the move over there.
transfer.waitingBody: On your old phone, approve the move. Check this match code matches:
transfer.waitingHint: Keep both phones open. This request expires in a few minutes.
transfer.movedBody: Your profile moved to this phone.
transfer.errorSelf: That is this phone's own code.
transfer.errorTooMany: Too many requests for that profile right now. Try again shortly.
transfer.errorDenied: The move was declined on the old phone.
transfer.errorExpired: The request expired. Start over to try again.
transfer.errorGeneric: Could not move the profile. Try again.
transfer.approveBody: Someone entered your code on a new phone and wants to move your profile there. Only approve if that was you.
transfer.approveMatch: Match code on the new phone:
transfer.approveWaiting: Waiting for the new phone to finish…
transfer.approveDoneBody: Your profile now lives on your new phone. This phone has signed out.
transfer.approveError: Could not complete the move. Try again.
